title: vaccinium fragile var. fragile
intro: Vaccinium fragile var. fragile, also known as the fragile blueberry or alpine blueberry, is a rare and endangered plant species belonging to the heath family (Ericaceae) native to the high-altitude alpine regions of the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Vaccinium fragile var. fragile include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Traditional herbal preparations of Vaccinium fragile var. fragile include making teas, infusions, and tinctures from its leaves and berries, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
